## What is an online hackathon?

An online hackathon is a digital event that brings together people, especially from a tech background with similar interests, to innovate, brainstorm, and solve various predefined challenges within a specified time frame. Online hackathons are usually conducted with the help of a online hackathon platform or hackathon software. The aim of an online hackathon is often to create a working solution or prototype of a product or service.

* * *

## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

Here is a step-by-step guide to run a virtual hackathon:

* Conceptualize the event concerning the themes, objectives, challenges and stages.
 
* Configure an online hackathon platform that allows all event-related execution on a single dashboard.
 
* Market the event through social media outreach and email campaigns. Invite participants to create teams, strategize and collaborate.
 
* Review submission on different parameters and, based on it, automatically calculate results.
 
* Create a live leadership board for transparency.
 
* Undertake a post-event analytics to host an even better hackathon next time.
 

The benefits of hackathons are:

Crowdsource ideas-

Hackathons serve as a playground for new people and technologies to step in and innovate.

Create a strong employer brand-

Emerge as the voice of innovation and change with strong brand recall.

Hire the best talent-

Shorten the recruitment process from a couple of weeks to a few days.

Engage with your employees

by fostering cross-team collaboration, inclusivity and internal innovation.

Accelerate the product roadmap

by accessing multiple working prototypes in a short period.

A virtual hackathon is a digital event that brings together people, especially from the tech background with similar interests, to innovate, brainstorm and solve predefined challenges within a specified time frame. A virtual hackathon usually aims to create a working solution or prototype of a product or service. A common understanding of hackathon participants is limited to coders and analysts. Yet a more unorthodox approach can bring together quantitative and qualitative minds, opening your virtual hackathons/ideathons to problem-solvers in general.

Hackathons are a new trend in tech communities. A hackathon program is a great way to make inroads into the tech community, build a brand name and recruit. Based on the ideas of innovation, problem-solving and prototyping, a hackathon program creates a business simulation to empower participants to innovate, brainstorm, and solve various predefined challenges within a specified time frame. An internal hackathon and external hackathon program envisages a working solution or prototype of a product or service.

Coding hackathon is conducted to ascertain the coding skills of potential developers when hiring the best tech talent.

Power up your innovation with Mercer | Mettl Xathon
